positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a mythological celestial guardian creature, rendered in a vibrant, geometric Art Nouveau style. The creature, which blends elements of a griffin and a lotus, is centered and symmetrical, featuring intricate feather patterns and glowing mandalas on its wings and mane. The color palette must be limited to deep sapphire blues, metallic golds, emerald greens, and pristine whites. The composition should feature strong, clean silhouettes suitable for printing on fabric, with high contrast between the figure and the background. Details should be highly defined, using linework that mimics woodblock printing and stained glass. Background elements include stylized cosmic swirls and repeating abstract geometric patterns to enhance the overall celestial theme. Flat vector quality, high resolution, designed for apparel print, full body, 4k print quality, masterpiece.
